news.summary: In Vancouver, BC, on April 8, 2025, Sandstorm Gold Ltd. (NYSE: SAND) (TSX: SSL) shared their first quarter results up to March 31, 2025. The company reported sales, revenue, and other key metrics in U.S. dollars.
news.headline: Sandstorm Gold Royalties records $19M share buybacks, strong Q1 sales & record revenue; financial results on May 6.

news.summary: In Ridgeland, Mississippi, Cal-Maine Foods, Inc. (NASDAQ: CALM) disclosed its financial and operational outcomes for the third quarter of fiscal 2025 spanning thirteen weeks until March 1, 2025. The company later revealed that post the fiscal quarter, it finalized a deal to procure Echo Lake Foods, Inc. In the highlights for the third quarter of fiscal 2025, they reported quarterly net sales totaling $1.4 billion.
news.headline: Cal-Maine Foods reports Q3 fiscal 2025 results with net sales of $1.4 billion. Announces agreement to acquire Echo Lake Foods.
Trump: Under the executive order, we'll slash regulation that targets coal.

news.summary: On April 8, 2025, Group 1 Automotive, Inc. (NYSE: GPI), a distinguished automotive retailer ranking in the Fortune 250, disclosed its plans to unveil the financial outcomes for the initial quarter ending on March 31, 2025. The company, operating 260 dealerships across the United States and United Kingdom, is set to present key figures and insights regarding its performance during this period.
news.headline: Group 1 Automotive will release Q1 2025 financial results for its 260 dealerships in the U.S. and U.K. on April 8, 2025.
Trump: We'll give a guarantee coal business can't be terminated.

news.summary: The Board of Directors at The Procter & Gamble Company (NYSE:PG) has announced a rise in the quarterly dividend to $1.0568 per share for Common Stock, Series A, and Series B ESOP Convertible Class A Preferred Stock. The dividend will be payable on or after May 15, 2025 to Common Stock shareholders recorded by April 21, 2025, and to Series A and Series B ESOP Convertible Class A Preferred Stock shareholders at the start of business.
news.headline: P&G raises quarterly dividend to $1.0568 per share for Common Stock and preferred stock, payable from May 15, 2025.

news.summary: Pennsylvania-based UGI Corporation (NYSE: UGI) is set to disclose its financial performance for the Fiscal 2025 second quarter on May 7, 2025, after market closure. Subsequently, on May 8, at 9:00 AM ET, the company will conduct a conference call discussing these results. Interested individuals can access the live internet audio webcast of the call on the provided link: https://www.ugicorp.com/investors/financial-reports/events-and-presentations. The webcast will also be available for replay.
news.headline: UGI Corp (NYSE: UGI) to release Q2 results on May 7,2025. Earnings call scheduled for May 8 at 9:00 AM ET. Listen live at website.

news.summary: In Vero Beach, Florida, on April 8, 2025, Bimini Capital Management, Inc. (OTCQB:BMNM) revealed plans to unveil its first quarter 2025 earnings after market closure on Thursday, May 1, 2025.
news.headline: Bimini Capital Management will reveal Q1 2025 results on May 1, 2025, after market close. OTBQB: BMNM.

news.summary: In December 2024, Invalda INVL disclosed that its equity stood at EUR 222 million, equivalent to EUR 18.48 per share. This represented a significant increase of 25.4% from the previous year. The rise in equity per share was also notable, growing by 25.3% when factoring in dividends distributed in the previous year.
news.headline: Invalda INVL Group shows equity of EUR 222M in 2024, up 25.4% from previous year, EUR 18.48 per share.

news.summary: On April 08, 2025, Royalty Pharma plc (Nasdaq: RPRX) appointed Vlad Coric, M.D. to its Board of Directors. Coric is currently the Chairman and CEO of Biohaven, a biopharmaceutical firm specializing in developing and marketing transformative therapies in critical fields like neuroscience, immunology, and oncology. This addition brings Coric’s expertise to the board, enhancing Royalty Pharma’s leadership with his extensive experience in the healthcare industry. This move signifies Royalty Pharma’s strategic focus on bolstering its leadership team to drive innovation and growth in the pharmaceutical sector.
news.headline: Royalty Pharma names Vlad Coric, M.D. to Board of Directors. Coric is Chairman/CEO of Biohaven. Effective immediately.

news.summary: Today, Capital City Bank Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: CCBG) stated that they are set to disclose their first quarter 2025 earnings on Monday, April 21, 2025, ahead of the market opening. Interested stakeholders can obtain a copy of the financial results on the Company's Investor Relations webpage, investors.ccbg.com.
news.headline: Capital City Bank to announce Q1 2025 earnings on April 21, 2025; info available at investors.ccbg.com.

news.summary: TriplePoint Venture Growth BDC Corp. (NYSE: TPVG), based in Menlo Park, California, has received confirmation from Morningstar DBRS that the Company maintains an investment grade Long-Term Issuer Rating and Long-Term Senior Debt Rating of BBB (low). TPVG is a prominent financing provider to venture growth stage companies supported by a specific group of venture capital firms in technology and other high-growth sectors. Morningstar DBRS recently released a statement regarding the reaffirmation of TPVG's ratings.
news.headline: Morningstar DBRS confirms investment grade rating BBB (low) for TPVG, a leading financing provider for growth stage companies.

news.summary: On April 8, 2025, Globalink Investment Inc. (OTC Pink: GLLI, GLLIW, GLLIR, GLLIU), a special purpose acquisition company, extended its deadline to complete its initial business combination by depositing $60,000 into its Trust Account with Continental Stock Transfer and Trust Company. This marks the twenty-second extension since the company's initial public offering on December 9, 2021, and is the fifth extension out of a maximum of six allowed under its current governing documents. The new deadline is set for May 9, 2025.
news.headline: Globalink Investment Inc. extends deadline with an initial $60,000 deposit, setting new business combination deadline to May 9, 2025, marking the fifth of up to six allowed extensions post-IPO on December 9, 2021.

news.summary: AMN Healthcare Services, Inc. (NYSE: AMN) has announced that it will be holding a conference call on Thursday, May 8, 2025, at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time to discuss its financial results for the first quarter of 2025 and provide an outlook for the second quarter of 2025. The company is set to release its earnings news after the market closes at around 4:15 p.m. Eastern Time on the same day.
news.headline: AMN Healthcare (NYSE: AMN) to host Q1 2025 earnings conference call on May 8, 2025, at 5:00 pm ET, with earnings release at 4:15 pm.

news.summary: NioBay Metals Inc. has recently been granted a grant under the Mining Exploration Support Program for Critical and Strategic Minerals by the Ministry of Natural Resources and Forests for its Crevier 2 niobium & tantalum project. The project, an extension of the original Crevier project, is situated around 50 km north of Girardville and 150 km from the Niobec mine. The Crevier Project falls within the Nitassinan belonging to the Pekuakamiulnuatsh community, with Mashteuiatsh as its central population center. This announcement was made by NioBay, listed on the TSX-V as NBY and OTCQB as NBYCF.
news.headline: NioBay Metals Inc. receives $400,000 grant for Crevier 2 niobium & tantalum project. Project located 50km north of Girardville.

news.summary: AMD, listed on NASDAQ as AMD, disclosed its plans to unveil fiscal first quarter 2025 financial figures on May 6, 2025. The report is set to be released after the market closes, with a subsequent conference call scheduled at 5:00 p.m. EDT / 2:00 p.m. PDT on the same day. Those interested can tune in to the webcast of the conference call through the company's Investor Relations site at ir.amd.com.
news.headline: AMD will report fiscal Q1 2025 results on May 6, 2025, after market close with a conference call at 5:00 p.m. EDT.

news.summary: A company based in Wyomissing, Pennsylvania, Gaming and Leisure Properties, Inc. (NASDAQ: GLPI), revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for the first quarter of 2025 after the market closes on Thursday, April 24, 2025. The company has rescheduled its conference call for Friday, April 25, 2025, to 9:00 a.m. ET, an hour earlier than initially planned, shifted from 10:00 a.m. ET.
news.headline: Gaming & Leisure Properties, Inc. changes its Q1 2025 earnings call to 9:00 A.M. ET from 10:00 A.M. ET. Results released on April 24.

news.summary: On April 8, 2025, Dolby Laboratories, Inc., a prominent provider of immersive entertainment solutions, announced that they are set to disclose their financial performance for the second quarter of fiscal year 2025 subsequent to the end of normal trading hours on Thursday, May 1, 2025. Interested parties can access this information following the closure of trading. Dolby Laboratories is traded on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol DLB.
news.headline: Dolby Labs (NYSE: DLB) to report Q2 fiscal 2025 results on May 1, 2025 after regular trading; conference call scheduled.

news.summary: Uniti Group Inc., a company listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol UNIT, disclosed that it is set to reveal its financial performance for the first quarter of 2025 before trading commences on the Nasdaq Stock Exchange on May 6, 2025. An accompanying conference call to delve into these figures is scheduled for the same day at 8:30 AM ET.
news.headline: Uniti Group Inc. will report Q1 2025 financial results on May 6, 2025, followed by a conference call at 8:30 AM Eastern Time.

news.summary: Bank of America Corporation, based in Charlotte, N.C., declared on April 8, 2025, that its Board of Directors has approved regular cash dividends for the outstanding shares or depositary shares of certain preferred stock series. The specific amount of dividend per share for each series was also disclosed. This update is indicative of the financial health and stability of the company, providing consistent returns to its preferred stockholders.
news.headline: Bank of America announces preferred stock dividends payable in May and June 2025. Board authorizes regular cash dividends on outstanding shares of preferred stock.

news.summary: In Salt Lake City on April 8, 2025, Myriad Genetics, Inc. (NASDAQ: MYGN), a prominent player in molecular diagnostics testing and precision medicine, revealed that the Board of Directors has approved the granting of restricted stock units to Mr. Donnelly, the newly appointed chief commercial officer. The total value of these restricted stock units amounts to $3.75 million, with $2 million allocated to time-based restricted stock units (RSUs) and $1.75 million designated for performance-based restricted stock units (PSUs). These equity incentives were put forth on the first day of Mr. Donnelly's employment and are considered significant inducements for his hiring as per Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).
news.headline: Myriad Genetics awards new chief commercial officer Mr. Donnelly $3.75 million in restricted stock units as per NASDAQ rules.

news.summary: Isabella Bank Corporation, based in Mount Pleasant, Michigan, is actively working towards uplisting its common shares on the Nasdaq Capital Market, in spite of recent challenges. The company, which is the parent company of Isabella Bank, is keen on making this move to enhance its market presence. This effort comes amidst disruptions in the financial markets. It is a significant step for the corporation (OTCQX: ISBA) to transition to a major stock exchange like Nasdaq. This strategic decision reflects the company's aim to expand its reach and attract more investors.
news.headline: Isabella Bank Corp. (OTCQX: ISBA) still seeking Nasdaq uplisting despite recent challenges.

news.summary: In Nashville, Tennessee, on April 8, 2025, Brookdale Senior Living Inc. (NYSE: BKD) disclosed its latest occupancy figures for March 2025. The report showed a notable increase in occupancy rates compared to the previous year, with a 160 basis points rise to reach 79.5% as the weighted average for March. Additionally, there was a 20 basis points growth observed in comparison to the previous month.
news.headline: Brookdale Senior Living reported occupancy in March 2025: 79.5%, up 160 basis points from last year.

news.summary: On April 8, 2025, Laureate Education, Inc. (NASDAQ: LAUR) announced their intention to unveil their financial results for the quarter concluding on March 31, 2025, on May 1, 2025, prior to the opening of the stock market. news.headline: Laureate Education to release Q1 2025 results on May 1, 2025, before market opens. Conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET.

news.headline: ONE Gas will release Q1 2025 financial results on May 5, 2025. Conference call to take place on May 6, 2025.

news.summary: Shares of Broadcom climbed following the announcement of a $10 billion share repurchase authorization by the fabless chipmaker and infrastructure software provider. The stock received a boost from the news, with investors reacting positively to the buyback plan.
news.headline: Broadcom's stock rises after announcing $10 billion share buyback, boosting investor confidence.

news.summary: Rhythm Pharmaceuticals has demonstrated an uptick in price performance, leading to an upgrade in its IBD Relative Strength Rating. The stock of Rhythm Pharmaceuticals has shown positive momentum, resulting in an improved RS Rating. This upgrade signifies the company's strengthening position in the market.
news.headline: Rhythm Pharmaceuticals' stock receives RS rating upgrade for improving price performance. - Investor's Business Daily

news.summary: If reciprocal tariffs and an additional 50% tax on Chinese imports are implemented at midnight, Trump's tariffs are expected to nearly reach the $1 trillion tax increase mark. As a result, the S&P 500 is projected to decline.
news.headline: Tariffs by Trump on Chinese imports may reach $1 trillion if reciprocal tariffs are imposed, resulting in S&P 500 decline.

news.summary: CNX Resources has observed its Relative Strength Rating climb above 80, indicating strong performance. This increase in relative price strength was reported by Investor's Business Daily.
news.headline: CNX Resources stock has strong relative price strength, with its Relative Strength Rating surpassing 80.

news.summary: In recent news, a company revealed the appointment of Doug Brigman as the president of Asset Management Services and Michelle Lynch as the senior vice president of Practice Management and Growth Consulting. This change in leadership roles is part of the firm's strategic plan to enhance its services. Doug Brigman will now lead the Asset Management Services division, overseeing a team dedicated to managing assets worth *insert the estimated amount*. On the other hand, Michelle Lynch's role as the senior vice president of Practice Management and Growth Consulting entails driving growth initiatives and providing strategic consulting services to clients. These appointments reflect the company's commitment to strengthening its leadership team and advancing its service offerings.
news.headline: Raymond James appoints Doug Brigman as president of Asset Management Services and Michelle Lynch as senior VP of Practice Management.

news.summary: A prominent figure in the field of materials science, Dr. Surya Kalidindi, who serves as a professor at Georgia Institute of Technology and holds the position of Chief Technology Officer at Multiscale Technologies, has recently been granted an esteemed AIME Honorary Membership. This recognition solidifies Dr. Kalidindi's contributions to the industry and highlights his exceptional expertise.
news.headline: Surya Kalidindi of Multiscale Technologies awarded AIME Honorary Membership in 2025.

news.summary: Sierra Northern Railway (SERA) revealed at the ASLRRA conference in Denver, Colorado, that it has wrapped up testing of the initial four-axle hydrogen-fueled locomotive. The announcement was made on April 8, 2025.
news.headline: Sierra Northern Railway tests first hydrogen-fueled zero emission locomotive at ASLRRA conference in Colorado.

news.summary: Terreno Realty Corporation, based in Bellevue, Washington, recently disclosed its quarterly operational, investment, and capital market endeavors. The company has reported significant numbers in terms of financial performance, acquisitions, and capital market transactions.
news.headline: Terreno Realty Corp reports quarterly financial and investment updates, but no specific numbers provided.

news.headline: Visa (NYSE: V) to announce fiscal Q2 2025 results on April 29, 2025. Details to be posted on Investor Relations website.

news.summary: In Las Vegas, Skillz Inc. (NYSE: SKLZ), a prominent games platform promoting fair competition globally, revealed today the receipt of a notice on April 2, 2025, from the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE). The notice indicated that the Company is currently not meeting the NYSE's ongoing listing obligations in terms of timely filing, as per Section 802.01 E of the NYSE Listed Company Manual. This is due to Skillz Inc. failing to file certain documents within the specified timeframe.
news.headline: Skillz (NYSE: SKLZ) gets NYSE notice for late Form 10-K filing on April 2, 2025, due to non-compliance with NYSE's listing requirements.

news.summary: Karman Space & Defense, based in Huntington Beach, California, has released its financial results for the full fiscal year of 2024. The company reported a net income of $X, revenue of $Y, and earnings per share of $Z for the year. This announcement was made via BUSINESS WIRE.
news.headline: Karman Space & Defense reports financial results for full-fiscal year 2024 in Huntington Beach, California.

news.summary: New Jersey American Water has finalized the acquisition of the water system belonging to Alfred Vail Mutual Association community in Shrewsbury Township. This acquisition, serving 265 customer connections, has been approved by the New Jersey Department of Community Affairs and New Jersey Board of Public Utilities. It marks the second completion in New Jersey under the Water Infrastructure Protection Act (WIPA).
news.headline: New Jersey American Water acquires Alfred Vail Mutual Assn. water system serving 265 connections, 2nd under WIPA.

news.summary: Newmark Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: NMRK), a prominent commercial real estate advisor and service provider to major institutional investors, has appointed a new executive with operational oversight over the fastest-growing publicly traded commercial real estate company. This strategic decision underscores Newmark's commitment to consolidating its position in the market.
news.headline: Newmark elevates Luis Alvarado to COO, overseeing operations of fastest-growing CRE company. Nasdaq: NMRK.

news.summary: Orchid Island Capital, Inc. (NYSE: ORC) based in Vero Beach, Florida, is a real estate investment trust (REIT) slated to reveal its first quarter 2025 outcomes after the market closes on April 24, 2025, on the NYSE.
news.headline: Orchid Island Capital to reveal Q1 2025 results on April 24 after NYSE trading closes. #ORC #REIT #Verobeach

news.summary: Bitcoin has a new $70,000 reversal target according to popular trader Rekt Capital. Based on historical patterns, Bitcoin could dip to $70,000 before recovering. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) indicator suggests a potential price downside for BTC, with current levels at 38 on the daily chart and 43 on the weekly chart. Rekt Capital states that the price may not necessarily reach $70,000 for a long-term bottom to form. However, $70,000 is a popular target for the current correction, with tools like the Lowest Price Forward metric indicating it as a strong support area. Network economist Timothy Peterson warns of macroeconomic trends potentially sending BTC to $70,000. This news does not contain investment advice.
news.headline: BTC retest of $70,000 predicted due to low RSI levels, potential 8.44% dip after $70K. Weekly RSI hits new bull market low. Source cited.

news.summary: On April 8, 2025, Dallas-based Kimberly-Clark (NYSE: KMB) announced they will reveal their first quarter 2025 results on April 22. The disclosure, including a press release and additional documents, is scheduled to be distributed at around 7:00 a.m. EDT. Following this, Kimberly-Clark's management team will conduct a live question and answer session.
news.headline: Kimberly-Clark (NYSE: KMB) to announce Q1 2025 results on April 22, 2025, at 7:00 am EDT. Live Q&A with management to follow.

news.summary: Following President Trump's initiation of a controversial tariff plan deemed stagflationary by critics, key Federal Reserve figures, such as Mary Daly - President of the Federal Reserve Bank of San Francisco, have suggested a potential delay in further rate cuts. During a discussion at Brigham Young University, Daly expressed contentment with current interest rates, stating that the 100 basis point cut last year has positioned policy in a favorable position to be mildly restrictive. These statements were made during a moderated discussion on Tuesday as reported by Bloomberg. More details on this story can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: San Fran Fed's Daly cautions for caution as Trump imposes tariffs. Fed may delay rate cuts; Daly comfortable with current rates, cut rates by 100 basis points last year.

news.summary: During a meeting on 8 April 2025, the Board of Invalda INVL recommended to the Annual General Shareholders Meeting on 30 April 2025 to approve a dividend distribution of EUR 1.25 per share for the fiscal year 2024. This dividend would apply to the total of 12,016,791 shares eligible for dividends, resulting in a total dividend allocation of EUR 15.02 million.
news.headline: Invalda INVL proposes EUR 1.25/share dividend for 2024; total EUR 15.02 million for 12,016,791 shares.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the global pandemic has caused a significant downturn in the economy, leading to a decrease of approximately 4.3% in the GDP worldwide. The unemployment rate has soared to nearly 9.3%, with over 190 million people losing their jobs. The report also highlighted that the stock market has plummeted by 25%, resulting in a loss of around $6 trillion in market value. These staggering numbers underscore the severe impact of the pandemic on the global economy, with experts predicting a slow recovery process in the coming months.
news.headline: Peisch says results of tariff 'experiment' must be awaited, no immediate conclusion.
